      Method
      Description
      com.jcraft.jsch.ChannelSftp.get(String, int)
      This method will be deleted in the future.

      This method will be deleted in the future.
      com.jcraft.jsch.ChannelSftp.setFilenameEncoding(String)
      com.jcraft.jsch.Identity.decrypt()
      The decryption should be done automatically in Identity.setPassphrase(byte[])
      com.jcraft.jsch.JSch.addIdentity(String, String)
      use #addIdentity(String prvkey, byte[] passphrase)
      com.jcraft.jsch.JSch.removeIdentity(String)
      use #removeIdentity(Identity identity)
      com.jcraft.jsch.KeyPair.decrypt(String)
      use #decrypt(byte[] _passphrase)
      com.jcraft.jsch.KeyPair.setPassphrase(byte[])
      use #writePrivateKey(String name, byte[] passphrase)
      com.jcraft.jsch.KeyPair.setPassphrase(String)
      use #writePrivateKey(OutputStream out, byte[] passphrase)
      com.jcraft.jsch.Session.setPassword(String)
      use #setPassword(byte[] password)
